title: Exomicrum glaberrimum

Within the Asteraceae family, Exomicrum glaberrimum is placed in the subfamily of Carduoideae, which is characterized by plants with composite flowers. Exomicrum glaberrimum is further classified into the genus of Exomicrum, which is a small group of plants that are native to the tropical regions of Asia. The specific classification of Exomicrum glaberrimum is: Exomicrum glaberrimum (Hook.f.) Hand.-Mazz., which is a specific and detailed classification that reflects its botanical identity.
